project: Crypto Trading Bot - Phase 1: Paper Trading End-to-End
description: Phase 1: 모의투자 엔드투엔드 연결 - 백테스트에서 모의투자까지 대시보드에서 원클릭 실행

userStories.title: SQLite 데이터베이스 스키마 생성
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create database schema for storing paper trading sessions, trades, portfolio snapshots, and strategy signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement _init_db() method with 4 tables: paper_trading_sessions, trades, portfolio_snapshots, strategy_signals
paper_trading_sessions table: session_id (PK), strategy_name, start_time, end_time, initial_capital, final_capital, total_return, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, win_rate, status
trades table: trade_id (PK), session_id (FK), symbol, timestamp, type, price, size, commission, pnl, pnl_pct
portfolio_snapshots table: snapshot_id (PK), session_id (FK), timestamp, total_value, cash, positions (JSON)
strategy_signals table: signal_id (PK), session_id (FK), symbol, timestamp, signal, indicator_values (JSON), market_price, executed
Database file created at data/paper_trading.db on initialization

userStories.title: TradingDatabase CRUD 메서드 구현
userStories.description: As a developer, I need methods to create sessions, log trades, signals, snapshots, and retrieve session data.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement log_trade(session_id, trade: Dict) with validation
Implement log_signal(session_id, signal: Dict) with validation
Add basic error handling for missing session_id

userStories.title: PaperTrader 멀티 심볼 지원 리팩토링
userStories.description: As a developer, I need PaperTrader to support trading multiple symbols simultaneously.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PaperTrader.__init__ to accept symbols: List[str]
Track positions per symbol using Dict[str, float]
Update execute_buy/execute_sell to accept symbol parameter
Update get_portfolio_value to sum across all symbols
Maintain backward compatibility with single symbol usage

userStories.title: PaperTrader 데이터베이스 연동
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate TradingDatabase into PaperTrader for persistent logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional db: TradingDatabase parameter to PaperTrader.__init__
Create session_id in start() using db.create_session() if db provided
Log trades via db.log_trade() after execution
Log signals via db.log_signal() when generated
Update session with final metrics in stop() method
Handle case when db is None gracefully

userStories.title: PaperTrader 실시간 실행 루프 구현
userStories.description: As a user, I want PaperTrader to fetch live data and execute trades in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Add is_running flag with start()/stop() control methods
Fetch ticker for each symbol via broker.fetch_ticker(symbol, overseas=True)
Fetch historical OHLCV data for strategy indicator calculation

userStories.title: Paper Trading 탭 UI 추가
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Paper Trading tab in the dashboard to start and configure paper trading.
acceptanceCriteria: Add strategy selector dropdown (RSI, MACD, MA, Bollinger, Stochastic)
Add multi-select for US stocks (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, NVDA, TSLA)
Add slider for position_size (0.1 to 1.0, default 0.95)
Disable buttons appropriately based on session state
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Paper Trading 세션 시작/중지 기능
userStories.description: As a user, I want to start and stop paper trading sessions from the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement start_paper_trading() instantiating PaperTrader with config
Run paper trading in background thread
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 실시간 포트폴리오 현황 표시
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my portfolio status in real-time during paper trading.
acceptanceCriteria: Show positions table: Symbol, Shares, Current Price, Market Value, P&L, P&L %
Show 'No active session' when not trading
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Strategy Comparison 탭 추가
userStories.description: As a user, I want to compare performance of different paper trading sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Display comparison table: Strategy, Symbols, Start/End Time, Capital, Return %, Sharpe, Drawdown %, Win Rate %
Show best strategy based on win_rate
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 수익 곡선 비교 차트 구현
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see equity curves for selected sessions on a chart.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch portfolio snapshots for each session from database
Plot equity curves using plotly line chart
Each session has different color with strategy + session_id label
Handle sessions with no snapshots gracefully
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Paper Trading 단위 테스트 작성
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for TradingDatabase and PaperTrader integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Test error handling for invalid inputs

userStories.title: 실시간 모니터링 통합 테스트
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests for real-time paper trading.

userStories.title: 대시보드 Paper Trading 탭 통합 테스트
userStories.description: As a QA, I need end-to-end test for Paper Trading dashboard workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Test portfolio display with mock data

userStories.title: 문서 업데이트 - Phase 1 완료
userStories.description: As a developer, I need updated documentation reflecting Phase 1 implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Update README.md with Paper Trading feature
Update trading_bot/CLAUDE.md with PaperTrader real-time mode
userStories.notes: All documentation updated. Typecheck passes for all Phase 1 code (pre-existing errors in other files).
